description: Imported reference workload for fair cross-engine comparison: reverse bulk load, build index, reopen, one direct lookup, 10k random point lookups.

dataset.notes: Reference-normalized dataset: persons(id,name,age) generated in reverse id order.

workload.notes: After build and reopen: execute one direct lookup by key, then random point lookups by id.

faultProfile.notes: No fault injection for imported reference workload.

fairnessProfile.notes: Shared fairness intent for Polar.DB vs SQLite imported reference comparison.
